dashboard.label: Operation Feeding Time
dashboard.description: End-to-end kill chain detection: Phishing → PowerShell → Credential Dump → Lateral Movement → Exfiltration

search.query: index=wazuh sourcetype=wazuh rule.id IN (100006,100005,100014,100010,100011,100001,100015,100016,100105) | eval phase=case( rule.id="100006", "1. Initial Access", rule.id="100005", "2. Execution", rule.id="100014", "3. Persistence", rule.id="100010", "4. Defense Evasion", rule.id="100011", "4. Defense Evasion", rule.id="100001", "5. Credential Access", rule.id="100015", "5. Credential Access", rule.id="100016", "6. Lateral Movement", rule.id="100105", "7. Exfiltration", 1=1, "Unknown" ) | timechart count by phase

index=wazuh sourcetype=wazuh rule.id IN (100001,100005,100018,100105) | eval endpoint_ip=win.eventdata.sourceIp | eval timestamp=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | join type=left endpoint_ip [ search index=wazuh sourcetype=nginx:access | rename clientip as endpoint_ip | eval nginx_timestamp=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") ] | table timestamp, rule.id, rule.description, endpoint_ip, uri, status, user_agent | sort -timestamp

index=wazuh sourcetype=wazuh rule.id IN (100001,100002,100005,100006,100008,100010,100011,100014,100015,100016,100105) | eval severity=case( tonumber(rule.level)>=14, 10, tonumber(rule.level)>=12, 7, tonumber(rule.level)>=10, 5, 1=1, 3 ) | stats sum(severity) as risk_score, count as alert_count, values(rule.description) as detections by agent.name | eval risk_tier=case( risk_score>=20, "CRITICAL", risk_score>=10, "HIGH", risk_score>=5, "MEDIUM", 1=1, "LOW" ) | sort -risk_score | table agent.name, risk_tier, risk_score, alert_count, detections

index=wazuh sourcetype=wazuh rule.id IN (100001,100002,100005,100006,100008,100010,100011,100014,100015,100016,100105) | eval mitre_id=mvindex('rule.mitre.id{}', 0) | stats dc(mitre_id) as unique_techniques | eval label="Techniques Detected"
index=wazuh sourcetype=nginx:access | stats count as requests by uri | eval uri_short=replace(uri, "^/", "") | sort -requests
index=wazuh sourcetype=nginx:access | stats count by clientip | iplocation clientip | geostats latfield=lat longfield=lon count

index=wazuh sourcetype=wazuh rule.id IN (100001,100005,100006,100010,100011,100014,100015,100016,100105) | eval phase=case( rule.id="100006", "Initial Access", rule.id="100005", "Execution", rule.id="100014", "Persistence", rule.id="100010", "Defense Evasion", rule.id="100011", "Defense Evasion", rule.id="100001", "Credential Access", rule.id="100015", "Credential Access", rule.id="100016", "Lateral Movement", rule.id="100105", "Exfiltration" ) | stats earliest(_time) as first_seen, latest(_time) as last_seen, count as alert_count, values(rule.description) as detections by phase, agent.name | eval duration_minutes=round((last_seen - first_seen)/60, 2) | eval first_seen=strftime(first_seen, "%H:%M:%S") | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen, "%H:%M:%S") | table agent.name, phase, first_seen, last_seen, duration_minutes, alert_count, detections | sort agent.name, phase
